---
title: "generate_figure_2.R"
author: "charley"
date: "29/09/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Init

```{r init, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# Packages
library(CCAMLRGIS)
library(raster)
library(SOmap)
library(qwraps2)
options(qwraps2_markup = "markdown")
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Set working directory
setwd("C:/Users/cgros/code/IMAS/ARC_Benthic_Mapping/vulnerable_marine_ecosystems/vme_index")

# Source functions
source("utils.R")

# Path towards data
path_raster <- "C:/Users/cgros/code/IMAS/ARC_Benthic_Mapping/vulnerable_marine_ecosystems/20210930_raster_cover/raster_data.csv"
path_scores <- "C:/Users/cgros/code/IMAS/ARC_Benthic_Mapping/vulnerable_marine_ecosystems/vme_index/morpho_taxa_scores.csv"

n_subplots <- 4
```

## Read data

```{r read_data, inclde=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# Read Data
df <- read.csv(path_raster)
df_taxa <- read.csv(path_scores)
if ("morpho_taxon" %in% colnames(df_taxa)) {
  list_taxa_all <- gsub("-", "..", df_taxa$morpho_taxon)
} else {
  list_taxa_all <- NA
  #list_taxa_all <- tolower(df_taxa$Taxon)
}
```

## Compute statistics

```{r summary_table, results = "asis"}
list_taxa_selected <- intersect(list_taxa_all, colnames(df))
my_summary <-
  qsummary(df[, list_taxa_selected],
           numeric_summaries = list("min" = "~ min(%s)",
                                    "mean (sd)" = "~ qwraps2::mean_sd(%s)",
                                    "max" = "~ max(%s)"),
           n_perc_args = list(digits = 4, show_symbol = TRUE, show_denom = "always"))

summary_table(df[, list_taxa_selected], my_summary)
```

## Violin plots

```{r jenks, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
df_mean <- as.data.frame(df 
                         %>% summarise(across(list_taxa_selected,
                                              function(x,...)
                                              {if (!all(is.na(x))){mean(na.omit(x))} 
                                                else{NA}})))
df_mean <- df_mean %>% tidyr::pivot_longer(df_mean,
                                           cols=list_taxa_selected,
                                           names_to="taxa",
                                           values_to="avg")

df_mean <- arrange(df_mean, avg)
step_ <- round(nrow(df_mean) / n_subplots)
for (i_subplot in 0:3) {
  df_mean[(i_subplot * step_+1) : ((i_subplot+1) * step_), "subplot"] = i_subplot+1
}
#jenks_breaks <- get_jenks_breaks(df_mean$avg, n_subplots)
#df_mean$subplot <- apply_jenks_breaks(df_mean$avg, jenks_breaks, n_subplots)
```

```{r group_4}
taxa_4 <- na.omit(df_mean[df_mean$subplot == 4, ]$taxa)
df_4 <- df[, taxa_4]

df_4 <- tidyr::pivot_longer(df_4,
                            cols=taxa_4,
                            names_to="morpho_taxa",
                            values_to="percent_cover")

df_4 <- df_4[df_4$percent_cover > 0, ]
df_4$percent_cover <- df_4$percent_cover * 1000
df_4 <- cbind(df_4$morpho_taxa, 
              tidyr::separate(df_4, col=morpho_taxa, sep="\\..", into=c("morpho", "taxa")))
colnames(df_4)[1] <- "morpho_taxa"
p_4 <- df_4 %>% 
  ggplot( aes(x=morpho_taxa, y=percent_cover, fill=taxa)) +
    geom_violin(width=1.4, trim=FALSE) +
    #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, color="grey", alpha=0.2) +
    #scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE) +
    #theme_ipsum() +
    theme(
      #legend.position="none",
      #plot.title = element_text(size=11)
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45) #, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1)
    ) +
    ggtitle("A Violin wrapping a boxplot") +
    xlab("") +
    ylim(c(0, 10000))
p_4
```

```{r group_2}
print(df_mean[df_mean$subplot == 2, "taxa"])
```

```{r group_3}
print(df_mean[df_mean$subplot == 3, "taxa"])
```

```{r group_4}
print(df_mean[df_mean$subplot == 4, "taxa"])
```
